data.title: Reusable Hypersonic Space Systems Just Moved from Simulation to Flight Testing and the Only Commercial Supersonic Fleet in the World Is the Platform
data.description: Starfighters Space, Inc. has recently disclosed a significant development. The company, listed on the NYSE American as FJET, has formed a strategic alliance with Blackstar Orbital. This partnership aims to enhance the flight testing of reusable hypersonic "SpaceDrone" systems. The testing will utilize Starfighters' F-104 supersonic aircraft. This collaboration marks a crucial step in advancing aerospace technology.

data.title: Bitcoin holding at $65K support in Week 14 as Glassnode data shows reduced sell pressure. ETF outflows and low spot volume hint at fragile recovery.
data.description: According to a recent analysis by Glassnode, Bitcoin is currently showing stability within the $65,000 to $67,000 range. The data indicates a reduction in sell-side pressure, suggesting a possible plateau in the market. However, concerns arise from outflows related to Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) and low trading volume in the spot market, pointing to a fragile recovery for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: $222M in Ethereum funds lost amid crypto bill concerns and market pressures, contributing to $414M outflows last week.
data.description: Ethereum experienced the largest decrease in funds as concerns over the Clarity Act and general economic challenges prompted crypto outflows of $414 million within the week.

data.title: Nium introduces stablecoin card issuance on Visa & Mastercard for businesses to use digital dollar balances at POS.
data.description: The platform's goal is to assist companies in issuing cards funded by stablecoins, enabling the use of digital dollar balances for purchases through current card networks.

data.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Insurance Company and Its Affiliates
data.description: AM Best has confirmed the Financial Strength Rating (FSR) of A++ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings (Long-Term ICR) of “aa+” (Superior) for Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Insurance Company and its property/casualty affiliates based in Omaha, NE. Together known as Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Companies (BHHC), the ratings reflect a stable outlook. These ratings apply to the following companies within the BHHC group.

data.title: KFC® Has an Answer to the Value Wars: A Value Feast Fit for the Moment
data.description: KFC is excited to launch Box Feasts, a new menu offering starting at $7. This lineup aims to provide customers with increased quantities of chicken at affordable prices. The initiative, unveiled in Plano, Texas on March 30, 2026, represents a strategic shift for the company towards offering greater value to its customers.
